syllogism_text: There exist some things which are fruits that are not apples. It is true that all fruits are foods. From this, it follows that there are some foods that are not apples.

attempts.code:
% Witness: a fruit that is NOT an apple
fruit(grape).
\+ apple(grape).

% All fruits are foods
food(X) :- fruit(X).

% Apple has no facts, so use fail clause
apple(_) :- fail.

% Validity check: some food is not an apple
valid_syllogism :- food(X), \+ apple(X).
